chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI S.M.A. No. 235 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main petition. 03.12.2019 Mr. Arfan Hussain Shah, advocate for petitioner. ----------- Through the instant petition, petitioner Syed Muntazir Mehdi has prayed for the grant of Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration in respect of moveable and immoveable properties/assets, details whereof are mentioned in the Schedule of Properties attached with the memo of petition, available at page 27, which were left by his deceased wife, namely, Mst. Uroog Fatima, who allegedly died on 15.12.2018 at Karachi, leaving behind Syed Muntazir Mehdi (widower/petitioner), Syed Manzar Mehdi Rizvi (son), Syed Mazhar Mehdi (son), Syeda Ailiya Batool (daughter), and Syeda Aliza Batool (daughter) as her legal heirs. Original Death Certificate of deceased as well as photostat copies of Family Registration Certificate, issued by the NADRA, title documents of the immovable properties and bank statements are also filed at page 23, 25 and 37 to 267. Legal heirs No. 2 to 5 have filed their affidavits of no objection for the grant of Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration in favour of the petitioner. Two witnesses, namely, Syed Ansar Mahdi Rizvi s/o. Syed Abid Hussain Rizvi and Syed Muzahir Hussain s/o. Syed Sadiq Hussain have also filed their respective affidavits and affirmed that there is no other legal heir of the deceased except mentioned above. Their affidavits are also available on record. Notice of this petition was published in Daily “Jang” Karachi dated 28.10.2019; however, none has filed any objection to the grant of Succession

Their affidavits are also available on record. Notice of this petition was published in Daily “Jang” Karachi dated 28.10.2019; however, none has filed any objection to the grant of Succession 2 Certificate and Letter of Administration to petitioner, as per the report submitted by the Deputy Registrar (OS) on 14.11.2019. Today petitioner and legal heirs No. 2 to 5 as well as above named witnesses are present. They affirm the contents of memo of petition as well as their affidavits and also verify their signatures thereon. Since all the legal formalities/requirements have been fulfilled, there is no impediment in grant of Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration to petitioner, therefore, the petition is allowed. The office is directed to issue Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration in respect of movable and immovable properties/assets shown in the Schedule of Properties, as per rules. J U D G E Athar Zai
